texts.orig: With private practice doctors and Visionworks retail locations to choose from nationwide, getting the most out of your benefits is easy at a VSP Premier Edge" location.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You'll get great care from a VsP network doctor, including a WellVision Exam?. An annual eye exam not only helps you see well,but helps a doctor detect signs ofeye conditions and health conditions, like diabetes and high blood pressure.
texts.text: You'll get great care from a VsP network doctor, including a WellVision Exam?. An annual eye exam not only helps you see well,but helps a doctor detect signs ofeye conditions and health conditions, like diabetes and high blood pressure.
